word: The city has improved its public transportation; ___, traffic congestion remains a serious problem.
explanation: however は逆接。前半の改善と後半の問題が対比されています。

word: Many students work part-time jobs after school; ___, they have less time to study at home.
explanation: as a result は結果を表します。

word: The program helps students develop communication skills; ___, it gives them opportunities to work with people from different backgrounds.
explanation: in addition は情報の追加を表します。

word: Some local governments are trying new ways to reduce waste; ___, they encourage citizens to use reusable bags.
explanation: for example は具体例を導入します。

word: Online classes are convenient for many learners; ___, they may not provide enough face-to-face interaction.
explanation: nevertheless は譲歩・逆接を表します。

word: The number of tourists has increased rapidly; ___, local businesses have gained more customers.
explanation: therefore は原因から結果への流れを示します。

word: Some people believe that technology makes life easier; ___, others worry that it reduces human interaction.
explanation: on the other hand は対立する見方を示します。

word: Reading newspapers can improve vocabulary; ___, it helps learners understand current social issues.
explanation: moreover は追加・強調です。

word: The company introduced flexible working hours; ___, employee satisfaction improved.
explanation: consequently は結果を表します。

word: The policy may not solve every problem; ___, it can be an important first step.
explanation: still は「それでも」という譲歩を表します。

word: Because the population is aging, the demand for healthcare workers is increasing; ___, training programs should be expanded.
explanation: therefore は主張の根拠から結論へつなぎます。

word: There are many ways to support children’s learning at home; ___, parents can read books with them regularly.
explanation: for instance は例示です。

word: Studying abroad can be expensive; ___, it can provide valuable cultural experiences.
explanation: nevertheless は費用の問題を認めつつ価値を示します。

word: Public libraries provide access to books; ___, they often offer free educational events.
explanation: furthermore は追加です。

word: Many people rely on smartphones for information; ___, digital literacy has become increasingly important.
explanation: as a result は結果を導きます。

word: Renewable energy is becoming cheaper; ___, it still requires investment in new infrastructure.
explanation: however は逆接を表します。

word: Schools should teach students how to evaluate online information; ___, students can avoid believing unreliable sources.
explanation: so that は目的を表します。

word: Public transportation should be improved ___ it can reduce traffic and air pollution.
explanation: because は理由を表します。

word: ___ technology is useful in education, teachers still play an essential role.
explanation: Although は譲歩を表す従属接続詞です。

word: ___ governments invest in local industries, more young people may choose to stay in their hometowns.
explanation: If は条件を表します。

word: The cost of living has risen; ___, many families are trying to reduce unnecessary spending.
explanation: as a result は結果を示します。

word: AI can make work more efficient; ___, it may also change the skills required in the workplace.
explanation: at the same time は別の側面を同時に示します。

word: Volunteering benefits local communities; ___, it helps participants develop a sense of responsibility.
explanation: also は追加です。

word: Many environmental problems are connected to daily habits; ___, leaving lights on wastes energy.
explanation: for example は具体例です。

word: In conclusion, schools should provide more career education; ___, students can make better decisions about their futures.
explanation: in this way は前の提案がもたらす結果をまとめます。

word: Some people prefer living in large cities; ___, others value the quiet environment of rural areas.
explanation: by contrast は比較・対照を示します。

word: The Internet allows people to access information quickly; ___, misinformation can spread just as fast.
explanation: 前半は利点、後半は問題点なので however が適切です。

word: More students should learn about finance ___ it helps them manage money responsibly.
explanation: because は理由を示します。

word: ___ remote work saves commuting time, it can make communication more difficult.
explanation: Although は利点を認めつつ欠点を述べます。

word: Exercise improves physical health; ___, it can reduce stress and improve concentration.
explanation: besides は追加情報を示します。
